findings.title: ImportFromCaddyfile bypasses all pre-condition validators
DesiredState.policies is dead state — never populated
findings.defer_reason: policies field is Phase 5+ scope — removing requires spec alignment

findings.title: PolicyAttachment and RoutePolicyAttachment are structural duplicates
findings.defer_reason: policy model consolidation is Phase 5+ scope

findings.title: ImportFromCaddyfile emits coarse whole-map diffs and silently overwrites entities
apply_set_global_config and apply_set_tls_config emit no-op diffs
Identifier newtypes accept any string — no ULID validation
schemars lives in core dependencies rather than gated as build/feature dep
Hardcoded relative path in build.rs
gen_mutation_schemas uses process::exit(1)
Proptest only covers CreateRoute — missing CreateUpstream, SetGlobalConfig, SetTlsConfig
All-None GlobalConfigPatch accepted as silent no-op
build.rs missing cargo:rerun-if-changed for schema output directory
ForbiddenReason does not implement Display — error messages show Debug output
Per-variant schema stub files lack $id field
Per-variant schema stub $ref points to a non-existent definition
check_upstreams_exist error path omits the offending upstream index in JsonPointer
Misleading error for empty hostname labels — EmptyLabel variant missing
Test idempotency_on_mutation_id verifies determinism not idempotency — rename
Outdated comment in build.rs references wrong path
findings.wont_fix_reason: build.rs comment is accurate; no path mismatch found in current code

findings.title: allow(clippy::option_option) is struct-level, not field-level
capability.rs zd suppression comment format
findings.wont_fix_reason: already in correct zd: format per review

findings.title: gen_mutation_schemas binary lives in core crate — architectural concern
findings.defer_reason: moving binary to a separate crate is a Phase 5+ build restructure

findings.title: RoutePatch triple-state semantics undocumented
Schema stubs use non-standard x-variant extension field
DesiredState::empty() is an alias for Default::default() — unnecessary API surface
findings.defer_reason: 18+ call sites; empty() has semantic value ('empty configuration snapshot' intent). Claude's own assessment: low priority.

findings.title: AuditEvent has both derived Debug and manual Display — unclear which is canonical
findings.wont_fix_reason: clippy::mod_module_files prevents the rename; both impls serve different purposes (Debug for diagnostics, Display for audit vocab)

findings.title: Dead audit_event_for arm for Rollback should be annotated
MutationOutcome.kind field should be renamed audit_event
to_json silent serialization failure
schema_drift integration test missing — CI cannot detect schema drift
Audit diff before-state reads from mutated state, not original
apply_upgrade_policy silently no-ops when policy_attachment is None
updated_at field responsibility undocumented
content_address SHA-256 utility out of scope in mutation/types.rs
DesiredState.version is public — callers can bypass +1 invariant
version increment unchecked — i64::MAX overflow causes panic
AttachPolicy accepts preset_version == 0
No justfile recipe for schema validation
Non-object mutation payload produces MissingExpectedVersion instead of Malformed
SetTlsConfig capability check only gates on ACME email, not all TLS fields
CreateRoute capability uses wrong module name for header handler
AttachPolicy/UpgradePolicy version mismatch uses generic ValidationRule
check_detach_policy and check_upgrade_policy perform redundant map lookups
AUDIT_KIND_VOCAB only accessible in test scope
No compile-time guard against adding AuditEvent variants without updating VOCAB
serde_json Number precision trap in DesiredState JSON canonicalization
findings.defer_reason: forward-looking guard for Phase 5 canonicalization; no serde_json::Value::Number iteration exists in Phase 4 code

findings.title: Optimistic concurrency TOCTOU gap — needs BEGIN IMMEDIATE for SQLite
findings.defer_reason: pure-core Phase 4 layer is fine; guidance is for Phase 5 SQLite adapter implementation

findings.title: Schema-version DB column should be in Phase 5 migration, not defaulted at read time
findings.defer_reason: forward-looking note for Phase 5 migration authoring; no DB migration exists yet

findings.title: No validation of redirect URL scheme — open redirect to arbitrary protocols
on_demand_ask_url accepts loopback and RFC 1918 addresses — SSRF vector
CIDR matchers accept invalid notation — no parse-time validation
RoutePatch/UpstreamPatch fields are .clone()d instead of moved — unnecessary allocation
check_detach_policy error-vs-no-op semantics are undocumented
apply_set_global_config clone_from semantics are non-obvious — needs a comment
Public enums lack #[non_exhaustive] — future variant additions are semver-breaking
schemars and proptest dependencies not version-pinned — supply-chain risk
Missing validation for black-hole routes (no upstream and no redirect rule)
Caddyfile import warnings are discarded — not surfaced in MutationOutcome
findings.defer_reason: surfacing warnings in MutationOutcome requires MutationOutcome schema changes; deferred to Phase 5 when the apply layer is wired

findings.title: HostPattern variant/content consistency not validated
RedirectRule.status accepts any u16 — not constrained to valid HTTP redirect codes
audit.rs should be audit/mod.rs per spec — future submodule extensibility
findings.wont_fix_reason: clippy::mod_module_files (workspace lint) forbids mod.rs — rename would fail the gate

findings.title: Extra ValidationRule variants diverge from phase spec without amendment note
